title: Colors
description: Hex color codes that can be shared, cross-platform. They can be converted at point of usage, such as HSL for web or CMYK for print. Neutrals and vibrant colors are converted to 9-step OKLCH palettes; light_dark colors get a primary + Subdued variant. Brand maroon (#641529) sourced from logos/planohockeylogo2026.pdf. Run `npm run colors` after editing to regenerate colors.json.
